title: Ability to turn Updates and replies into items or subitems
excerpt: I’d like to be able to quickly turn conversations into action items. By incorporating a dropdown and/or pop-up when hovering, I’d like to have the option to quickly turn an Update or a reply into a new item. See screensh…

posts.author: dlaina (D'Laina Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to be able to quickly turn conversations into action items. By incorporating a dropdown and/or pop-up when hovering, I’d like to have the option to quickly turn an Update or a reply into a new item. See screenshots for examples. This is frequently needed for me.

Screen Shot 2023-05-26 at 5.31.56 PM1482×1546 189 KB

Screen Shot 2023-05-26 at 5.32.06 PM1548×958 121 KB

posts.author: greg-hrc (Greg Collette)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great feature! I find myself using my Update Feed (Inbox) as a second “My Work” since a lot of to-dos come out of updates.
